reviews.review_title: I was scammed out of 15 dollars
reviews.review_description: I recently bought the humored horrors bundle in overload and waited 3 days but it never gave me any of the promised coins or the cosmetics so I lost 15 dollars and didn’t get anything. Other than that though the game is extremely fun and I would 100% recommend this to any vr player who loves gorilla tag physics and the Roblox game rivals or just dueling in general, developers if you read this please either help refund me or give me the promised cosmetics and coins thank you.

I've been playing this game for a week now, and this game is the best. If you have ever played other games like animal rivals or rival on roblox platform, then this game is perfect for you! But there are some bugs like when I load into the map pool and matrix, the game skips to round two, but the main bug I'm concerned about is when I can't shoot my guns most of the time. I hope this was helpful.

reviews.review_title: Awesome game to play with friends
reviews.review_description: When me and my friend started playing this we couldn’t stop playing and it was so fun we had a great time playing and it’s a easy way to make friends
Cool i lovee

I tried playing this game and quickly realized it’s basically dead I keep getting put into the same lobbies over and over usually with kids who are extremely annoying which makes the experience even worse
The game also has more bundles and monetization than actual gameplay content Honestly if I could get a full refund on the storage space it takes up I would because this game is not worth 672.12 MB There simply isn’t enough content to justify that size which is kind of insane
In my opinion this game shouldn’t even be on the Meta store in its current state And don’t trust the reviews most of them seem to come from a system where players are rewarded with in game items for leaving a review I never even saw or received anything related to those items which makes it feel misleading at best and scammy at worst
It’s honestly sad that some games rely on tactics like this instead of actually making a good game There are already games like Animal Rivals that do this genre far better Compared to that this just feels like low effort AI slop pretending to be a finished product
It cool

EDIT: I just hit level 30 holy crapples
This game is very good! I love it, and play it nearly everyday. There is one massive thing about the game, and that is the bugs. This game is packed with bugs and glitches that I hope to be patched in a future update. But otherwise, really good. I love how it is super fast paced, and an alternative to animal rivals if I don’t feel like playing that. Really recommend for the experienced gorilla tag player and fps player.
You need to fix how people can shoot through walls.

Overload VR is super fun and really fast‑paced. I like that you can do 1v1 duels, team matches, or free-for-all, and the guns feel really satisfying in VR. There are lots of skins and quests, so it keeps things interesting. It can be a bit tricky at first if you’re new to VR shooters, but once you get the hang of it, it’s really addictive. Definitely worth checking out if you like competitive VR games!

This game is way better than Animal Rivals!!! The prices for packs are decently cheap and high quality cosmetics. Although bugs can get really annoying the beta team tries their best to find and report the bugs, as well as the developer he tries his best to fix the bugs! The moderation team may be a little small but all the staff are really kind and are determined to help out the game. Now it not just the staff team, cosmetics, and different game modes to choose from that makes the game fun, the game play is really smooth and the movement is way better than most gorilla tag fan games can get. Personal my favorite game mode is duels but battle royale is also really fun, the map is as really big and unlike animal rivals you can get different guns form chests.
Good game but I bought the early access bundle and didn’t get anything

I played the game with my friend group and it was honestly a whole lot of fun, and the game overall is amazing, but there is some bugs where I join a private code, but it sends me to battle Royale or infection, so if you can please fix that then I'll be glad

Fun game, has a ton of potential. The fundamentals are similar to animal rivals but a way better game imo. I think the moderation needs to implemented but other wise a great game. I met the artist of the game,queso. He’s seems like a cool guy. He said I could give suggestions here since I don’t have discord.

Suggestions-
1.add 4v4s back
2.add customizable name tags.
3.add a quick play button in the main lobby.
4. Make a support that pings the enemy for a few seconds by giving them a green outline & call it the junko machine
5. Maybe make a gun game gamemode.
6. Make a bigger duels map made for people playing with snipers
7.make a revolver type gun with scope.
8.capture tha flag gamemode
9.add ranked 
10.made it where parties  actually teleport your party into the same lobby. Or add where you can teleport to your friends lobby.
